message:
🐛 Add HttpOnly cookie for JWT alongside Authorization header (#2474)

Set an HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax cookie (kc_auth) on login, refresh, and
clear on logout. The auth middleware now accepts tokens from: Authorization
header (existing), HttpOnly cookie (new), or _token query param (SSE).

This is the backend plumbing for migrating JWT out of localStorage.
Frontend continues to work with Authorization headers during migration.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
